signals.title: How frontier enterprises are building an AI advantage
signals.summary: OpenAI’s B2B Signals research shows how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI研究显示前沿企业通过深化AI应用和智能代理工作流构建持久竞争优势

signals.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
signals.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
signals.aiSummary: GPT-5.5升级智能化和个性化，减少幻觉问题，提升AI助手体验

signals.title: Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
signals.summary: OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布MRC多路径可靠连接协议，提升大规模AI训练集群的网络性能和可靠性

signals.title: GPT-5.5 Instant System Card
signals.aiSummary: GPT-5.5 Instant版本发布系统卡片，可能标志着AI模型响应速度和用户体验的重大提升

signals.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
signals.summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI推出ChatGPT自助广告管理平台，支持CPC竞价，标志着AI对话入口商业化加速

signals.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
signals.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI与普华永道合作，用AI代理自动化财务流程，重新定义CFO职能，推动企业级AI应用落地

signals.title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
signals.summary: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI重构WebRTC架构实现大规模低延迟语音AI，推动语音交互成为重要AI入口形态

signals.title: Where the goblins came from
signals.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
signals.aiSummary: GPT-5行为异常问题的根因分析和修复方案，涉及AI模型个性化输出缺陷

signals.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
signals.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI扩建Stargate计算基础设施支撑AGI发展，新增数据中心满足AI算力需求

signals.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
signals.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI模型和代理服务登陆AWS，为企业提供云端AI构建能力，推动AI应用入口多样化

signals.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
signals.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI获得美国联邦政府安全认证，为政府机构提供ChatGPT企业版服务

signals.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
signals.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
signals.aiSummary: 微软与OpenAI修订合作协议，简化合作关系并增加长期明确性，支持大规模AI创新发展
